channel.title: Digital Campus - Release Notes
channel.description: Technology products managed by the Digital Campus team

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: 1Password - 1Password for Android
item.description:
1Password

All Mac iOS

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design export job API now supports CSV export using the csv export file type. Only Canva Sheets designs can be exported as CSV.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Use NotebookLM in your Google Workspace Studio flows
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re integrating NotebookLM into Google Workspace Studio. This enhancement lets you use your existing notebooks as an AI knowledge source for your automations. You can use the new Ask NotebookLM step to generate grounded responses based on the insights, summaries, and research in your...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Assignments LTI™ and Gemini LTI™ are now available for Moodle
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re expanding the availability of Assignments LTI™ and Gemini LTI™ to include Moodle, joining our existing support for Canvas and Schoology. Gemini LTI™ brings Google AI tools like the Gemini app and NotebookLM directly into third-party Learning Management Systems (LMS), enabling students and...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - May 8, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - Default View Settings Have Moved to Views
item.description:
Kuali Build

Default View Settings are now managed directly in Views, making it easier to control what users see by default. Previously, admins configure...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Add avatars when you convert presentations to Vids
item.description:
Google Workspace

You can already convert your Google Slides content into Google Vids, and use Gemini to generate scripts, voiceovers, and background music. Now, you can add a spokesperson to your videos using AI avatars when importing content from Slides. Avatars are dynamically inserted throughout the imported...

View release notes →

macOS

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - May 8, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Now generally available: Bulk import using client-side encryption and the Drive APIPreviously available in beta, client-side encryption (CSE) customers can now conduct bulk migrations of sensitive files from both cloud and on-premises data sources. | Learn more about how to bulk import using...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - Interactive Design Lab Improvements Release
item.description:
Kuali Build

We’re excited to share a new set of improvements inspired by our first-ever Interactive Design Lab at Kuali Days 2026. This session brought ...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Improvements To Help Me Write in Gmail
item.description:
Google Workspace

As previously announced, Help me write in Gmail is evolving into an even more helpful partner that can pull in your natural voice and personalized context to get you closer to the perfect draft every time. We’ve added two new personalization enhancements:Topic contextualization: The feature can now...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Studio available in more languages
item.description:
Google Workspace

Google Workspace Studio has expanded its support to include seven new languages. In addition to English, Workspace Studio now offers full capabilities in:FrenchGermanItalianJapaneseKoreanPortugueseSpanishGetting startedAdmins: There is no admin control for this feature.End users: Try out Google...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - View the Google Meet live stream automatically if an adaptive meeting becomes full
item.description:
Google Workspace

We're making it simpler to join large Google Meet events. When an adaptive meeting reaches its maximum capacity for meeting contributors (those with camera, microphone, and screen sharing privileges), any additional users attempting to join the main call are automatically redirected to join the...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New Workspaces API added
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new endpoint for Workspaces API.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Improvements to the Meet starter step and Calendar time-blocking capabilities in Google Workspace Studio
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing enhancements to the Google Meet starter step in Google Workspace Studio. As part of this, the step When a meeting transcript is ready has been renamed When meeting outputs are ready. This step now allows you to decide if the workflow should run when either meeting transcripts or...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Turn your AI prompts into one-click tools using skills in Chrome
item.description:
Google Workspace

Professionals are using Gemini in Chrome to accelerate their daily workflows—from summarizing complex reports to drafting client emails and analyzing market data.Until now, repeating a high-value AI task meant re-entering the same prompt every time you navigated to a new page or document. To...

View release notes →

item.title: Kuali Build - Coming Soon: Streamlined UI updates - Arriving May 18, 2026
item.description:
Kuali Build

Our new user interface updates launch on May 18, 2026. See the original announcement for a detailed overview of what’s changing and how to p...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Require explicit consent for Take Notes with Gemini, recordings, and transcripts in Google Meet
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing a new feature that allows administrators to require explicit consent from meeting participants before automatic note-taking, recording, and/or transcription begins. With this update, admins can ensure that participants on supported devices must actively agree to be recorded, be...

View release notes →

item.description:
Ad Astra

item.description:
ClickUp

Gantt Baselines, Brain goes Mobile, ClickUp in ChatGPT, and More!This week's ClickUpdates brings Gantt Baselines to track how your project plans shift over time, the full power of Brain to your mobile device, ClickUp right inside ChatGPT, and more ways to customize how your meetings are captured.✨...

View release notes →

item.description:
Kuali Build

We’ve improved how search works in document lists to help you find the right records faster. These updates reduce noise and surface the most...

item.title: Kuali Build - New: View Effective Permissions for Any User
item.description:
Kuali Build

You can now see exactly what permissions a user has—all in one place. The new Effective Permissions tab, located within each user’s record, ...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Set custom instructions for Gemini in Google Docs
item.description:
Google Workspace

We are introducing the ability to set custom, persistent instructions for Gemini in Google Docs. These instructions ensure that Gemini adapts to your style, tone, and formatting preferences without needing to repeat them in every conversation, ultimately saving you time and ensuring...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Securely manage AI and agent access to Workspace data with the AI control center
item.description:
Google Workspace

Securely managing access for generative AI and agent actions to Workspace data is easier ever than before with the new AI control center in the Admin console. This new capability gives enterprise organizations greater visibility and control, especially for teams with stringent data security and...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Now generally available: Bulk import using client-side encryption and the Drive API
item.description:
Google Workspace

Previously available in beta, client-side encryption (CSE) customers can now conduct bulk migrations of sensitive files from both cloud and on-premises data sources. This process ensures confidential content is wrapped with customer-managed keys before it's imported into Google Workspace. Using...

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - May 1, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Move from conversation to creation with file generation in GeminiGemini can now transform your ideas, using conversational prompts, directly into thoughtfully formatted files, such as Google Docs, Sheets, and Slides, PDFs and more, directly in your chats with Gemini. | Learn more about how to move...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Takeout Transfer now supports Google Photos for Education users
item.description:
Google Workspace

When users graduate or leave an organization, they can preserve their academic work by using Google Takeout Transfer to take their Google Drive and Gmail content with them. We’re now expanding Google Takeout Transfer to include Google Photos, allowing users to migrate their memories from their...

View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Gain Better IT Asset Control and Visibility into Software Licensing With NinjaOne 13.0
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 13.0 release advances IT asset management (ITAM) capabilities with software license improvements that offer greater cost visibility, usage history for custom licenses, and refined control over permissions and assignments. The platform now includes robust Lost Mode support for managed...

item.description:

Important upgrade information Version 25 includes significant updates, which may introduce breaking changes, new internet connection requirements, and mandatory updates for some optional components.Upgrading from version 24.x? Please review Important points to know about PaperCut MF version...

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - PKCE is now generally available!
item.description:
Slack

We are excited to announce support for Proof Key for Code Exchange (PKCE). PKCE is an OAuth security extension that enables developers to build more secure Slack applications on public clients, such as desktop apps and mobile apps, without the need to embed a vulnerable client_secret.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Assets APIs⁠(opens in a new tab or window) now return an additional metadata property as part of the asset object.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design export job API now supports two additional email export formats: html_bundle and html_standalone. Use these formats when creating e
item.description:
Canva

The Create design export job API now supports two additional email export formats: html_bundle and html_standalone. Use these formats when creating export jobs for email designs, depending on whether you need bundled assets (html_bundle) or a standalone HTML output (html_standalone).

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Create design autofill job API now supports column_configs for chart data fields, allowing you to define column names and data types separately f
item.description:
Canva

The Create design autofill job API now supports column_configs for chart data fields, allowing you to define column names and data types separately from your data.

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't
item.description:
Canva

A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't provided in a request, the request type will be assumed to be type_and_asset.

View release notes →

item.description:
Slack

Version 3.15.0 of the developer tools for the Slack platform has arrived!

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Optional scopes have landed
item.description:
Slack

You can now mark individual OAuth scopes as optional when configuring your Slack app! Optional scopes give users more control over what data your app can access during installation, without blocking them from installing your app entirely.

View release notes →

item.description:
ClickUp

Update Task Types in Views, Pin AI Notetaker, and more! This week’s release unlocks the ability to manage Task Types in Views, add date ranges to Gantt view exports, and so much more. Update Task Type Column in Your Views: Quickly see and update task types directly from your List and Table views....

View release notes →

item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - Enhanced Proof of Play (POP) with **Hourly Reporting**, giving all customers more granular visibility into content performance throughout the day. - Improved Proof of Play to ensure reporting data...

item.title: ClickUp - Super Agents: Release Notes Takeover
item.description:
ClickUp

Super Agents: The world's first human-like AI AgentsSuper Agents™ are personalized AI teammates that understand your work, use powerful tools, and collaborate like humans. Just describe the problem you want solved, the workflow you want to automate, or where you’re wasting time, and Super Agents...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - ⚡ Join us for a Super Agents AMA on Reddit!
item.description:
ClickUp

Hey, everyone!We’re excited to announce a special Reddit AMA (Ask Me Anything) with the ClickUp AI Team, all about our latest feature: Super Agents!🗓️ When: Thursday, January 22nd, 10am–12pm PST📍 Where: the r/ClickUp subreddit on RedditThis is your opportunity to connect directly with Michael Van...

View release notes →

item.title: Korbyt - Korbyt Anywhere Product Recap - 01.12.2026
item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to over the break and last week week: 🆕 New & Enhanced - **Secrets API: Credential Management** — IT Admins can now securely manage the lifecycle of API credentials using a centralized Secrets API. This includes creating, listing,...

View release notes →

item.title: ClickUp - Introducing Super Agents™: The world’s first human-like AI agents
item.description:
ClickUp

Today, we’re launching ClickUp Super Agents – the first human‑like AI agents that live inside ClickUp and collaborate with your team like real teammates.These aren’t just chatbots or one‑off automations. Super Agents:See your work the way you do: tasks, docs, chats, meetings, and schedules all in...

View release notes →

item.description:
Korbyt

We're constantly working to improve Korbyt. Here's what we were up to this week: 🐞 Squashed Bugs - Fixed an issue where YouTube element showed an error due to recent changes in YouTube's Terms of Service. - Resolved a styling inheritance issue in Korbyt Create AI Layouts where elements did not...
